scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run start --workspace backend" "npm run start --workspace frontend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
